name: Docker Compose Development
description: Docker Compose patterns for local development with multi-service architectures.
claudeMd:
# Docker Compose Development

## File Organization
```
docker-compose.yml          — base services
docker-compose.override.yml — local dev overrides (auto-loaded)
docker-compose.prod.yml     — production overrides
.env                        — environment variables
```

## Conventions
- Use named volumes for persistent data (databases)
- Use bind mounts for source code in development
- Define health checks for all services
- Use `depends_on` with `condition: service_healthy`
- Network isolation: frontend/backend/db networks

## Service Naming
- `app` — main application
- `db` — primary database
- `cache` — Redis/Memcached
- `queue` — message broker
- `worker` — background job processor

## Environment Variables
- `.env` for shared defaults
- `environment:` in compose for service-specific
- Never commit secrets to `.env` — use `.env.example` as template

## Development Tips
- `docker compose up -d` — start all services
- `docker compose logs -f app` — follow app logs
- `docker compose exec app sh` — shell into container
- `docker compose down -v` — stop and remove volumes
